title: Cryptool joins W3X Network Incubation Program Batch 05
content_html:
Cryptool has been accepted into the W3X Network Incubation Program, Batch 05.

W3X is a top-tier accelerator for Web3 teams, and the program has been a strong push forward for the platform: sharpening the all-in-one investment proposition for both Web2 and Web3 investors, and connecting Cryptool to a wider network of operators, investors and mentors.

If you are building in Web3 and looking for the right environment to grow, the next W3X batch is worth a serious look.
author: Cryptool
